description:
Overview:

Halloween candlelight is made of high-quality plastic, the surface is and burr-free, the color is vivid and the light is bright.

Perfect for decorating Halloween Fall Thanksgiving parties, gardens, patios, restaurants, bars, trees, tables, fireplaces, wreaths, terraces, fences, pillars, centerpieces etc.

An ideal decor for a Halloween creepy-themed party, creates a spooky yet stylish.

Halloween candlelight special design, is suitable as a Halloween decoration, even at your home or outdoor party! Any time is, night or daytime! It would enhance this festive for you and your lovely family.

Absolutely no mess, no dripping wax, no smoke, no matches, no fire hazards or burning risks, families and children can safely enjoy the light and fun.


Product information:
Color: finger candle, four-corner skull candle
Material: PVC
Size: 7cm * 9cm * 8.5cm


Packing list:
1*Candle lamp
